title_i18n.pt-BR: Ilustração - Transformação em Desenho Infantil com Giz de Cera

title_i18n.ar: رسم توضيحي - تحويل إلى رسم طفولي بأقلام الشمع

description: A style-transfer prompt that reworks any reference image (product shot, screenshot, portrait, UI mockup) into a hand-drawn crayon illustration that feels like it was made by a 10-year-old. Replaces the original palette with bright playful crayon colors on clean white paper, and sprinkles childlike whimsy — castles, candy, stars, clouds, rainbows — to amplify the innocent storybook vibe. Works as an image-to-image edit in GPT-image-2 (requires uploading a reference image alongside the prompt); well-suited to website screenshots, brand key art, product photos, and portraits.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 将任何参考图像转换为10岁儿童手绘蜡笔插画风格，使用明亮的蜡笔色彩和白纸背景，添加童趣元素如城堡、糖果、星星、云朵、彩虹等。适用于网页截图、品牌视觉、产品照片和人像的 gpt-image-2 图生图编辑。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 將任何參考圖像轉換為10歲兒童手繪蠟筆插畫風格，使用明亮的蠟筆色彩和白紙背景，添加童趣元素如城堡、糖果、星星、雲朵、彩虹等。適用於網頁截圖、品牌視覺、產品照片和人像的 gpt-image-2 圖生圖編輯。
description_i18n.ja: あらゆる参考画像を10歳の子供が描いたようなクレヨンイラストに変換。明るいクレヨンカラーと白い紙に、お城やキャンディ、星、雲、虹などの童心あふれる要素を加えます。Webスクリーンショット、ブランドビジュアル、商品写真、ポートレートに対応した gpt-image-2 の画像編集機能。
description_i18n.ko: 모든 참조 이미지를 10세 어린이가 그린 크레용 일러스트로 변환합니다. 밝은 크레용 색상과 흰 종이에 성, 사탕, 별, 구름, 무지개 같은 동심 가득한 요소를 추가합니다. 웹 스크린샷, 브랜드 비주얼, 제품 사진, 인물 사진에 적합한 gpt-image-2 이미지 편집 기능입니다.
description_i18n.de: Verwandelt beliebige Referenzbilder in handgezeichnete Buntstift-Illustrationen im Stil eines 10-Jährigen mit leuchtenden Farben und kindlichen Elementen wie Schlössern, Süßigkeiten, Sternen und Regenbögen. Funktioniert als Bild-zu-Bild-Bearbeitung in gpt-image-2 für Screenshots, Produktfotos und Porträts.
description_i18n.fr: Transforme toute image de référence en illustration aux crayons de couleur dessinée par un enfant de 10 ans, avec des couleurs vives et des éléments ludiques comme des châteaux, bonbons, étoiles et arcs-en-ciel. Fonctionne comme édition d'image dans gpt-image-2 pour captures d'écran, photos produit et portraits.
description_i18n.ru: Превращает любое изображение в рисунок цветными мелками в стиле 10-летнего ребенка с яркими красками и детскими элементами вроде замков, конфет, звезд и радуг. Работает как редактирование изображения в gpt-image-2 для скриншотов, фото продуктов и портретов.
description_i18n.es: Transforma cualquier imagen de referencia en una ilustración con crayones dibujada por un niño de 10 años, con colores vivos y elementos lúdicos como castillos, dulces, estrellas y arcoíris. Funciona como edición de imagen en gpt-image-2 para capturas de pantalla, fotos de productos y retratos.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Transforma qualquer imagem de referência em ilustração com giz de cera desenhada por uma criança de 10 anos, com cores vibrantes e elementos lúdicos como castelos, doces, estrelas e arco-íris. Funciona como edição de imagem no gpt-image-2 para capturas de tela, fotos de produtos e retratos.
description_i18n.it: Trasforma qualsiasi immagine di riferimento in un'illustrazione a pastelli disegnata da un bambino di 10 anni, con colori vivaci ed elementi giocosi come castelli, caramelle, stelle e arcobaleni. Funziona come modifica immagine in gpt-image-2 per screenshot, foto prodotto e ritratti.
description_i18n.vi: Chuyển đổi bất kỳ hình ảnh tham khảo nào thành tranh minh họa sáp vẽ tay phong cách trẻ 10 tuổi với màu sắc tươi sáng và các yếu tố ngây thơ như lâu đài, kẹo, ngôi sao và cầu vồng. Hoạt động như chỉnh sửa ảnh trong gpt-image-2 cho ảnh chụp màn hình, ảnh sản phẩm và chân dung.
description_i18n.pl: Przekształca dowolny obraz referencyjny w ilustrację kredkami rysowaną przez 10-latka z jaskrawymi kolorami i dziecięcymi elementami jak zamki, cukierki, gwiazdy i tęcze. Działa jako edycja obrazu w gpt-image-2 dla zrzutów ekranu, zdjęć produktów i portretów.
description_i18n.id: Mengubah gambar referensi apa pun menjadi ilustrasi krayon bergaya gambar tangan anak 10 tahun dengan warna cerah dan elemen kekanak-kanakan seperti istana, permen, bintang, dan pelangi. Berfungsi sebagai pengeditan gambar di gpt-image-2 untuk tangkapan layar, foto produk, dan potret.
description_i18n.nl: Transformeert elke referentieafbeelding naar een handgetekende krijtjes-illustratie in de stijl van een 10-jarige met heldere kleuren en speelse elementen zoals kastelen, snoep, sterren en regenbogen. Werkt als beeldbewerking in gpt-image-2 voor screenshots, productfoto's en portretten.
description_i18n.ar: يحول أي صورة مرجعية إلى رسم توضيحي بأقلام الشمع بأسلوب طفل عمره 10 سنوات مع ألوان زاهية وعناصر طفولية مثل القلاع والحلوى والنجوم وأقواس قزح. يعمل كتحرير صورة في gpt-image-2 لقطات الشاشة وصور المنتجات والصور الشخصية.
description_i18n.tr: Herhangi bir referans görseli, 10 yaşında bir çocuğun çizdiği tarzda pastel boya illüstrasyonuna dönüştürür; parlak renkler ve kaleler, şekerler, yıldızlar, gökkuşakları gibi çocuksu öğeler içerir. Ekran görüntüleri, ürün fotoğrafları ve portreler için gpt-image-2'de görsel düzenleme olarak çalışır.
description_i18n.uk: Перетворює будь-яке зображення на ілюстрацію кольоровими олівцями в стилі 10-річної дитини з яскравими кольорами та дитячими елементами як замки, цукерки, зірки та веселки. Працює як редагування зображення в gpt-image-2 для скріншотів, фото продуктів та портретів.
description_i18n.en: A style-transfer prompt that reworks any reference image (product shot, screenshot, portrait, UI mockup) into a hand-drawn crayon illustration that feels like it was made by a 10-year-old. Replaces the original palette with bright playful crayon colors on clean white paper, and sprinkles childlike whimsy — castles, candy, stars, clouds, rainbows — to amplify the innocent storybook vibe. Works as an image-to-image edit in GPT-image-2 (requires uploading a reference image alongside the prompt); well-suited to website screenshots, brand key art, product photos, and portraits.

query.en:
Rework the given image into a crayon-style illustration, transforming the entire scene into something that feels hand-drawn by a 10-year-old. Preserve the general layout and spatial relationships of the original image — transform the style first, embellish second, so small UI elements, faces, and logos stay where they are. Keep the forms simple and slightly imperfect, like a child's drawing — wobbly outlines, uneven strokes, visible waxy crayon texture, soft smudges where colors overlap.

Avoid using the original color palette — replace it with bright, playful crayon colors (sunshine yellow, candy pink, sky blue, mint green, lavender, tangerine, grass green) on a clean white paper background with subtle paper grain. Aim for a soft, cute, and innocent aesthetic.

Incorporate fun, childlike details such as fairy-tale castles or towers in the corners, lollipops and candy, big shiny five-point stars, fluffy rounded clouds, a rainbow arc, a cheerful smiling sun, tiny hearts and sparkles scattered across the page to amplify the playful vibe. Keep the main subject of the reference image clearly recognizable — redraw it in crayon rather than replacing it — and render any visible text as wobbly kid handwriting that stays legible.

The final result should feel charming, colorful, and full of childlike imagination — like a kid pulled out a fresh crayon box and happily redrew the reference on a sheet of white paper.

Negative prompt: no photo-realistic rendering, no sharp vector lines, no 3D shading, no airbrush gradients, no dark or muddy palette, no adult fine-art technique, no watermark, no frame border, no garbled text.
query.zh-CN:
使用这个插件完成以下任务：Rework the given image into a crayon-style illustration, transforming the entire scene into something that feels hand-drawn by a 10-year-old. Preserve the general layout and spatial relationships of the original image — transform the style first, embellish second, so small UI elements, faces, and logos stay where they are. Keep the forms simple and slightly imperfect, like a child's drawing — wobbly outlines, uneven strokes, visible waxy crayon texture, soft smudges where colors overlap.

Avoid using the original color palette — replace it with bright, playful crayon colors (sunshine yellow, candy pink, sky blue, mint green, lavender, tangerine, grass green) on a clean white paper background with subtle paper grain. Aim for a soft, cute, and innocent aesthetic.

Incorporate fun, childlike details such as fairy-tale castles or towers in the corners, lollipops and candy, big shiny five-point stars, fluffy rounded clouds, a rainbow arc, a cheerful smiling sun, tiny hearts and sparkles scattered across the page to amplify the playful vibe. Keep the main subject of the reference image clearly recognizable — redraw it in crayon rather than replacing it — and render any visible text as wobbly kid handwriting that stays legible.

The final result should feel charming, colorful, and full of childlike imagination — like a kid pulled out a fresh crayon box and happily redrew the reference on a sheet of white paper.

Negative prompt: no photo-realistic rendering, no sharp vector lines, no 3D shading, no airbrush gradients, no dark or muddy palette, no adult fine-art technique, no watermark, no frame border, no garbled text.
